REQ FROM YOU GUYS !!

AGAIN, TO CLEAR UP, BOTH ARE ADULTS. AGE 21+ None of them are below the age of consent okay so don’t be a hoe and say something about age

Also dis pussykasa. No shit. Change that if ya wanna, its all up to you.

SCENARIO

Rui is a university professor, often on his work and doing as any professor should be doing. He remains professional, despite that one of his students keep flirting with him relentlessly. That student being Tsukasa Tenma. He never stopped, even though Rui remains silent and completely ignores a flirtatious comment. One day, he was stressed from work and needed to blow off steam. Deciding to go to a bar. Although he’d regret it, at first, when that blonde haired student of his had sat right next to him, Tsukasa…

SUMMARY

Rui is a uni professor. Keeping professional and on top of his work. Though he would have a distraction, Tsukasa. Who was a blonde haired student who constantly flirted with him. He ignores it like always. Though one day, he decides to visit a bar after a stressful day, only for Tsukasa to show up as well and sit by him.

Okay its been almost a week, and now i’m finally posting the Rui version. Hope yall happy. Also, despite him coming off as disinterested sometimes, he truly in reality does want that cookie, okay?
